name: hsearch
abstract: BM25 full-text search for PostgreSQL via a Tantivy-backed bm25 index
description: hsearch is a pgrx PostgreSQL extension that adds a custom `bm25` index backed by the Tantivy search engine. It exposes the `hyper` schema (ngram tokenizer cast, BM25 score function), the index-accelerated `&&&` match operator, and the `key_field` index storage option. The index lives on local disk and is rebuilt on failover (the search corpus is a derived projection and fully reconstructable).

hsearch.abstract: BM25 full-text search for PostgreSQL (bm25 index access method)
